programmes.show_description: The Chapel Of Unrest. Helen moved into a converted Methodist chapel, but it was soon clear she wasn't the only resident. During investigation, Barri gets hypnotised to find answers. S4, Ep15
A Sinister Séance. Terina has experienced terrifying paranormal activity in her childhood home. Determined to help her, Barri risks his life taking on the aggressive spirit. S5, Ep1
Teleshopping.
Drew explores an Aladdin's cave of magic carpets in Cumbria and royal biographer Lady Colin Campbell reveals antiques with tragic history from her romantic castle. S10, Ep6
Drew locks horns with a fellow dealer over a buffalo's skull in Oxfordshire. Plus, will a private girls' school in Hatfield get top marks for its haul of furniture? S10, Ep7
A couple are escaping the city and making the move to South East Cornwall. They hope to find a property with at least four bedrooms and a hot tub. S1, Ep3

Cycle expert Tim brings a broken unicycle back to life. Meanwhile, a hefty family heirloom needs the expert restoration skills of bookbinder, Chris. S7, Ep53
Bookbinder Chris is tasked with fixing a 50-year-old kite made of paper. Meanwhile, Dominic restores and revives a 1960s toy train. S7, Ep54
Leather expert Susie fixes up a treasured wallet. Electronics expert Mark and ceramics expert Kirsten work on a china dog and handmade kennel. S7, Ep55
Cobbler Dean restores and revives a pair of running spikes from the 1940s. Meanwhile, woodworker Will works on a rocking toy motorbike. S7, Ep56
Electronics expert Mark and bookbinder Chris are tasked with fixing up a radio hidden inside a book. An upholsterer fixes up a beloved chair. S7, Ep57
A treasured table from the late 1970s requires the attention of woodworker, Will. Modelling expert David fixes up a beloved horseracing game. S7, Ep58
It's a feisty reunion in Kent for experts Catherine Southon and David Harper as they realise ten years apart hasn't dulled their competitive edge. S26, Ep6
Catherine and David hit the shops in Sussex. They call on a doggy antique appraiser and David unwisely plays cricket in a shop full of china. S26, Ep7
Catherine and David visit the Isle of Wight. David goes Dutch but not before learning about French soldiers' passion for garlic. S26, Ep8
David and Catherine go digging for bargains on the Jurassic Coast. Catherine is attracted to old iron while David is daft for Delft. S26, Ep9
Catherine and David end their south coast jamboree, with an antique eel spear and a fetish doll up for auction. Will Catherine get out of second gear? S26, Ep10
Episode 103. British couples seek to swap grey skies for sun, sea and sand abroad. With the help of property experts, can they find the home of their dreams? S1, Ep23

Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell help people reunite with family members with whom they have lost contact or never met. S11, Ep8

programmes.show_name: Who Do You Think You Are?
programmes.show_description: Minnie Driver. Hollywood actress Minnie Driver is on a mission to find out more about her late father, Ronnie, and his family's background. S10, Ep3
Forgotten Phantoms. Stefan needs help proving his Elizabethan farmhouse is filled with spirits of the past. Investigators uncover a heartbreaking story of illegitimacy. S5, Ep2
The Demon Of Donegal. A brutal double murder haunts an infamous home in County Donegal, Ireland. But the owners are convinced there's something else lurking in the dark. S5, Ep3
The Secret Cellar. When landlords Harry and Jason open the door to a secret cellar in The Swan Hotel, they unleash a negative entity that delights in taunting the couple. S5, Ep4
Teleshopping.
Drew heads to Petworth in West Sussex - the antiques capital of the south. Plus, he bids on an unusual fire screen in Lancashire, but the owner drives a hard bargain! S10, Ep8
At a stately home in Staffordshire, Drew uncovers a hidden 19th century gem that the owners were oblivious to. And in the Lake District, he digs out some of Britain's mining past. S10, Ep9
A family want to finally move to the Algarve after years of holidaying there. They want at least three bedrooms and a swimming pool. S1, Ep4
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one!
Ann Widdecombe & Owain Wyn Evans. Angus uncovers model kits at the home of weatherman Owain Wyn Evans and clears the Devonshire bungalow of retired politician Ann Widdecombe. S2, Ep3
Helen Skelton & Nick Hancock. Angus finds quirky mementoes in TV presenter Helen Skelton's beautiful home and explores comedy legend Nick Hancock's barn conversion. S2, Ep4
Cheryl Baker & Syd Little. Angus helps Eurovision icon Cheryl Baker sell some pop memorabilia. Later he helps comedy legend Syd Little raise funds for his new pet project. S2, Ep5
TV presenter Anthea reveals a secret talent to Angus at her dad's home. And he finds a woolly mammoth tusk at Coronation Street star Simon's house. S3, Ep1
Philip Serrell and Stephanie Connell search for interesting antiques in Cockermouth. Who will make the most profit at the first auction in Crooklands? S19, Ep21
Philip Serrell and Stephanie Connell continue their road trip in Wigtown. Plus, Philip takes a break from shopping to visit the Tongland Power Station. S19, Ep22
Scotland Special. Drew and Tee are on a trip through the Scottish Lowlands. Their first stop is Buittle Castle, where one item compels Drew to pay £100 more than the asking price. S16, Ep1
Hats Off For A Deal. Drew is surprised by the items he picks up at a quirky shop in County Durham. Later, he must give up his hat to secure a deal on two extraordinarily rare items. S16, Ep2
A Mouse In The Table. Drew accepts a private invitation to one of the grandest stately homes in the country, Palace House. He is stunned by a large collection of electric light fittings. S16, Ep3
Knock From The Past. On a trip to Sheffield, Drew tries to agree a deal on some incredible industrial pieces. Later, he checks out a collection of unusual hunting artefacts in Ludlow. S16, Ep4
Wheels Of Fortune. Angus travels to Scotland to meet Norma, a widow struggling to let go of her late husband's much-loved possessions as she prepares to downsize. S5, Ep16
X Marks The Spot. Angus helps a lady sell her parents' belongings and finds treasure with a rare military map. Metal detecting finds and jewellery dazzle on sale day. S5, Ep17
Antiques experts travel the UK with a budget of £200 each in a competition to find and buy antiques or rare items and sell them for a profit. S25, Ep21
After clearing out a home in Leeds, the team sort through a van full of mysterious boxes. Plus, Angus checks out a retired archaeologist's beautiful collection. S2, Ep7
In Knaresborough, Angus sorts through a massive collection of model aircrafts and incredible paintings. Later, Angus auctions off some iconic toys. S2, Ep8
The Witches Of Leigh. In their most horrifying investigation yet, Ian performs exorcism to save a family in Essex. Jayne calls on the spirits of witches to help save them. S5, Ep5
